text: A man pushes his car to a hotel and tells the owner he is bankrupt. Why?
option_a: He lost all his money in a bet
option_c: His car broke down and he cannot afford repairs
option_d: The hotel is actually a bank

text: What can travel around the world while staying in a corner?
A woman shoots her husband, then holds him under water for five minutes. Finally, she hangs him. But ten minutes later they go out for dinner together. How is this possible?
option_b: She shot him with a camera, developed the photo, and hung it to dry

text: I have cities but no houses, forests but no trees, and water but no fish. What am I?
A cowboy rides into town on Friday, stays for three days, and leaves on Friday. How is this possible?
option_c: He stayed for exactly 72 hours starting Thursday
option_d: The town uses a different calendar

text: What gets wetter the more it dries?
A man is found dead in a field with an unopened package next to him. There are no other people, animals, or vehicles nearby. How did he die?
option_a: He was poisoned by the package contents
option_d: He died of natural causes while hiking

text: How can you throw a ball as hard as you can and have it come back to you, even if it doesn't bounce off anything and no one else catches it or throws it back?
option_b: Throw it straight up in the air
option_c: Throw it in a circular room
option_d: Attach a string to the ball

text: What disappears as soon as you say its name?
A truck driver is going the wrong way down a one-way street. He passes at least ten police officers. Why is he not caught?
option_c: The police officers are off duty
option_d: The street is closed for construction
